end_debrief_title: End the current session and open the debrief
end_session_confirm_intro: This closes the case for debrief. Once ended:
end_session_confirm_locked: Orders, exams, and chat are locked.
end_session_confirm_transcript: You can review the transcript in the debrief room but cannot reopen the case.
multi_tab_warning: this session is open in another browser tab. Last-write-wins applies.
